src: A red leather purse with a quilted pattern and a gold logo emblem. It features a flap closure and a gold chain strap attached to the sides.
edit: A vintage purse with a two-toned textured leather surface and an intricate bronze emblem. The flap has a classic brass closure and a dual-tone chain strap.

per_image_non_shared_src.laura-chouette-9gzSVDpyxPg-unsplash: The object is hanging on a person's shoulder, partially visible against a busy street background with cars and buildings slightly blurred.
per_image_non_shared_src.laura-chouette-FTaKIJ_uEo0-unsplash: The object is set on a white surface surrounded by luxury items like a perfume and a designer ribbon, showcased as a centerpiece.
per_image_non_shared_src.laura-chouette-R2DDxvSNxkM-unsplash: The object is lying flat on a white fabric, with its strap artfully curled, highlighting its texture against the soft background.
per_image_non_shared_src.laura-chouette-RycLeDdrWJ0-unsplash: The object is positioned on white fabric, with its chain prominently displayed, casting shadows on the textured backdrop.
per_image_non_shared_src.laura-chouette-b7kMR1VYAJc-unsplash: The object is displayed upright with various luxury items nearby, including a perfume bottle and designer accessories, creating an opulent setup.
